creator: Andre.Albsmeier@mchp.siemens.de
text:
On Tue, 06-Mar-2001 at 21:26:51 +0100, Dag-Erling Smorgrav wrote:
> Andre Albsmeier <andre.albsmeier@mchp.siemens.de> writes:
> > Hmm, /etc/rc runs savecore before dev_mkdb so the error message
> > makes sense. Maybe dev_mkdb should just be moved up ?
> 
> Try to apply rev 1.233:
> 
> # cd /usr/src/etc
> # cvs up -j1.232 -j1.233 rc
> # cp rc /etc
> 

Yes, that fixes it. Will you MFC it into -STABLE?

	-Andre
